infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AceAiX uses the camera so athletes can capture profile media, posts, stories, and verification materials.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AceAiX uses photo library access so athletes can choose profile media, posts, stories, and verification materials.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: AceAiX may save generated or edited athlete media to your photo library when you choose to export it.
